query: Review carrier performance for our top 5 carriers over Q1 — I need a scorecard with OTD rates, damage, cost per kg, and tracking reliability

I need a carbon emissions assessment for our logistics network — what are our Scope 3 emissions by carrier and by lane for the last 12 months?

can you audit our freight invoices against contracted rates? i think DHL is charging us above the agreed rate on the london-paris lane

I need a logistics performance summary for the COO meeting — carrier OTD trends, cost per kg trend, and any lanes where we're bleeding money on premium freight

We're considering opening a new distribution centre in Poland — run a network design comparison of a single UK DC vs dual DC setup
Assess our strategic packaging supplier — I need a full six-dimension review covering financial health, compliance certs, and operational performance
Reconcile this invoice from Acme against PO-4521 — the quantities don't match the goods receipt
Analyze our total procurement spend by category — where are the biggest consolidation opportunities across our vendor base?
